positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a crescent moon and scattered stars, forming an ethereal cosmic garland. The stars should be rendered as various geometric shapes (simple points, small circles, stylized constellations) connecting to the moon via delicate, glowing filigree lines. The overall composition should be circular and balanced, suitable for a central apparel print. Use a deep midnight blue background contrasted with glowing silver and gold accents. The style should be neo-tribal combined with modern whimsical etching, giving it a clean silhouette and high contrast. The lines must be sharp and crisp, ideal for screen printing or DTG.
negative: photorealism, blur, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, copyright, anime, cartoon, sketch, grayscale, solid color block
